## Background Logic Source Inventory

<!-- Generated by Wave 0 alongside File Inventory. DO NOT edit manually.
     This section is the cardinality contract consumed by Wave 2b researcher
     and Wave 7a reviewer. All discovered BL source files MUST appear here.

     Detection: read references/bl-source-patterns.md for per-stack patterns.
     Mode A stacks (Laravel/Rails/Django): apply folder-convention globs.
     Mode B stacks (NestJS/Spring/FastAPI/Go/Rust/.NET): apply annotation grep.
     Stack not in table: use [SIGNAL_INFERRED] protocol (see bl-source-patterns.md).

     Format per entry: `- {category}: {relative/path/to/File.ext}`
     Mode B with multiple hits in same file: one entry per hit (Symbol disambiguates).
     Sort: by category ascending, then by path ascending (deterministic).
     Empty category: emit `_(none found)_` — never silently skip. -->
